name: Easebuzz
description: Indian payment gateway focused on SMB with easy-to-integrate APIs, real-time payment tracking and payouts.

seo.title: Easebuzz — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Easebuzz: Indian payment gateway focused on SMB with easy-to-integrate APIs, real-time payment tracking and payouts.

when_to_use: Simple payment gateway integration for Indian SMB e-commerce sites
Real-time UPI, card, and net banking collection for Indian platforms
Payout API for Indian marketplace vendor disbursements
Subscription billing with easy API integration for Indian SaaS

review.verdict: Respectable Indian SMB gateway with competitive pricing — fine pick when Razorpay feels overkill.
review.best_for: Indian SMBs and startups wanting simple fast gateway onboarding
review.not_for: Enterprises needing the deepest integrations and enterprise support SLAs
